title: Sendbird Group Channel
description: A group channel for messaging between users in Sendbird.

channel_url.description: Unique URL identifier for the channel.

name.description: Display name of the group channel.

cover_url.description: URL for the channel cover image.

member_count.description: Total number of members in the channel.

joined_member_count.description: Number of members who have joined (not left) the channel.

unread_message_count.description: Number of unread messages for the requesting user.

is_distinct.description: Whether this is a distinct channel — only one channel can exist for a given set of members.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) when the channel was created.

data.description: Custom data string associated with the channel.
